sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 150 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 09.04.2026 Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel for the applicant states that the matter is covered against the applicant department by virtue of judgment dated 21.10.2025 passed in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-V, Corporate Regional Tax Office, Lahore vs. Power Line Construction Company (Pvt.) Ltd. Lahore (C.P.L.A. No.2442-L/2022). In view hereof, this reference application is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
